channel.title: Docs update: 11 July 2019 - JS and React basics
channel.description: We keep improving our docummentation: * Add [“Javascript basics” ](https://docs.frontity.org/javascript-and-and-react/javascript-basics) to explain which concepts are needed to understand Frontity (thanks to [luisherranz](https://github.com/luisherranz) & [SantosGuillamot](https://github.com/SantosGuillamot)) * Add [“React basics” ](https://docs.frontity.org/javascript-and-and-react/react-basic) to explain which concepts are needed to understand Frontity (thanks to [luisherranz](https://github.com/luisherranz) & [SantosGuillamot](https://github.com/SantosGuillamot))

item.title: Docs update: 11 July 2019 - JS and React basics
item.dc:creator: SantosGuillamot
item.description:
We keep improving our docummentation:

  • Add “Javascript basics” to explain which concepts are needed to understand Frontity (thanks to luisherranz & SantosGuillamot)
  • Add “React basics” to explain which concepts are needed to understand Frontity (thanks to luisherranz & SantosGuillamot)

Read full topic
item.source: Docs update: 11 July 2019 - JS and React basics
